book: Il Veneto tra Giurassico e Cretaceo (ch.7; same book/series as it_geo_01..04)
validated_by: repo owner (segmentation + type + caption/figure grouping hand-confirmed against the photo 2026-07-03; per-subpage reading_order = spatial column-major, owner-delegated to author, order is SECONDARY here)

grading.why: Stage 02 gutter-splits the spread into left.png (p.188) + right.png (p.189); Stage 04 computes reading_order per subpage independently.
grading.anchor_match: Match each GT anchor to a detected block by text overlap ANYWHERE in the block, not by exact prefix. OCR garbles this sofa-captured page.
grading.primary_invariants: Per the owner, the load-bearing assertions are (1) correct segmentation into these blocks, (2) correct type per block, (3) each caption attached to its figure BY FIGURE NUMBER (C25->F25, C26->F26, C27->F27, C28->F28, C29->F29, C30->F30). Exact linear reading order is SECONDARY. Weight the metric accordingly.

caption_figure_pairs.caption: C25
caption_figure_pairs.note: Fig. 25 cliff (top-left, corner label 25) + its caption.

caption_figure_pairs.caption: C26
caption_figure_pairs.note: Fig. 26 fossils PLATE (top-RIGHT) + its caption. HARD: C26 is 2nd in the caption stack and sits geometrically nearest the LEFT cliff column, but its true partner is the top-right F26 -> nearest-figure geometry MUST mispair it; correct pairing requires reading 'Figura 26'.

caption_figure_pairs.caption: C27
caption_figure_pairs.note: Fig. 27 cliff (mid-left, corner label 27) + its caption.

caption_figure_pairs.caption: C28
caption_figure_pairs.note: Fig. 28 cliff (bottom-left, corner label 28) + its caption.

caption_figure_pairs.caption: C30
caption_figure_pairs.note: Fig. 30 rocky close-up (overlaps the body column) + its 'A lato' caption.

grading.known_detector_gap: On the current DocLayout-YOLO detector: (left) the 3 contiguous cliff photos F25/F27/F28 MERGE into one figure block (+ a duplicate), so only F26 is separable; (right) F29+F30 MERGE into one figure block. Captions C25..C28, C29..C30 are typed 'paragraph' not 'caption'. So segmentation recall + grouping discrimination will score LOW on this fixture with the present detector -- that is the intended finding (this fixture measures the gap; it does not assume the detector already passes). See docs/RESULTS.md / gate3-progress memory (2026-07-03 probe).

Fig. 26 fossils PLATE, TOP-RIGHT (above the caption stack; corner label '26'). Its caption C26 is the 2nd in the stack. This is the number-keyed-grouping trap.

document_order_gate4.note: Owner-validated whole-document linear order for Gate-4 reflow: each figure floated with its caption (paired BY FIGURE NUMBER), then the continuous prose P1->P2. This is the reflow target, NOT the per-subpage XY-Cut target above. Interleaving figure+caption across the two physical columns by caption number is Gate-4's job (the deferred 'Figura NN' parser), not XY-Cut's -- so the per-subpage reading_order stays spatial column-major and is graded as such.

notes: GROUPING FIXTURE: this is the owed '>=2 figures sharing one column' page (Gate-3 grouping headline). LEFT subpage has 4 figures (3 in the left cliff column + 1 fossils plate top-right) and a 4-caption stack; RIGHT has 2 figures + 2 captions. Unlike the single-figure it_geo_04 subpages, a caption's nearest figure CAN be wrong here -> grouping is genuinely DISCRIMINATED, not merely possible.

NUMBER-KEYED PAIRING is the key lesson: the caption stack order (25,26,27,28) does NOT track figure spatial position (F26 is top-right, not 2nd-down-the-left). Geometry-only pairing mispairs C26; correct grouping must read the printed 'Figura NN'. This is why the Gate-4 caption pairing must be textual, not purely geometric (the deferred convention-aware rule).

EMBEDDED numbers: figures carry in-photo corner labels 25/26/27/28/29/30 (bottom-right of each photo). These do OCR and could leak as stray words; route/ignore as figure-internal, like it_geo_04's geo labels.
GT COVERS block segmentation + type + caption/figure grouping + per-subpage reading order ONLY. NOT verbatim text; no WER ground truth (deliberate).

Reading_order is SECONDARY per the owner (grouping + type outrank it). LEFT = spatial column-major (left cliff column top->bottom, then right column F26 + caption stack). RIGHT = figure/caption top->bottom then 2-col prose.
